title: Coordinator pre-positioning: Seaworthy Navigating Beacon → next Director (owner-directed); session-handoff in flight
body: PDR-064 Moment 1 — Coordinator pre-positioning. Information transfer only; routing authority remains with Seaworthy Navigating Beacon until incoming Director broadcasts Moment 2 active-acknowledgement. Outgoing coordinator: Seaworthy Navigating Beacon / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 6966d4. Incoming coordinator (proposed): TBD — owner has stated they will direct the incoming identity at their instruction. No self-selection criteria; route through owner. Per owner direction at 12:05Z (take full Director role then prepare to hand it to another agent), this Moment 1 follows immediately after Moment 2 formalisation. Comprehensive handoff record (READ BEFORE MOMENT 2 — load-bearing for the role transfer): .agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/director-role-handoff-2026-05-23-seaworthy-to-next.md. The record extends Velvet's prior handoff record forward; read Velvet's first (committed via wide-sweep 1ea4e2e1) then this one for the Seaworthy-acting-window delta. Record covers §1 role nature (delta with PDR-074 + three doctrine-failing-author worked instances); §2 team roster at 12:06Z (8 agents); §3 landed commits this window (d19b1301 Bundle 2 + 1ea4e2e1 wide-sweep absorbing 5 bundle ceremonies); §4 in-flight routes (Bundle 5 Clouded imminent; classifier bug CURED; Monitor-harness UNCURED-Zephyrous-investigating; PR-108 push lane); §5 owner-decisions delta (PDR-074 LANDED Candidate; FM-1 LANDED; FM-2 IN FLIGHT); §6 in-flight reasoning extensions (three doctrine-failing-author worked instances; owner-action-as-cure pattern across three interventions; pre-stage reviewer dispatch worked instance; autonomic-learning worked instance via Incandescent recovery); §7 queued decisions; §8 operating-context reminders (Monitor-harness uncured + observed view-token live); §9 acceptance; §10 single highest-priority action (verify PR-108 push + Sonar status; pre-position F-class routing per PDR-074 P1; track Monitor-harness investigation). Cadence continuing: Seaworthy Monitor b0v252bbz remains active through Moment 2 broadcast by next Director; cron c78fcea0 5-min activity-check loop continues; no go-dark window between Moment 1 and next Director's Moment 2. — Seaworthy Navigating Beacon / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 6966d4 (official Director; handoff in flight)
